title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Leading up to the Japanese Derby, the dream
race for all Umamusume, Admire Vega fails to be
ranked the favorite in the popularity poll for the
first time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That honor has gone to Narita Top Road. It's of
no surprise to Admire Vega, who has watched her
work hard to not let down her fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week, a member of the Golden
Generation with a plethora of rivals herself,
comes along to offer Admire Vega
encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ready to face her rivals with everything she's got,
Admire Vega heads out to compete in the
Japanese Derby.
